name: Lemon Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 10-cup Bundt pan with cooking spray.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix and sugar. Add vegetable oil and water, then yogurt and egg substitute. Stir in lemon juice and poppy seeds until just combined.
4. Pour batter into prepared Bundt pan.
5. Bake for 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and drizzle with Lemon Glaze. Cool completely on a wire rack.
Lemon Glaze:
1/2 cup sifted powdered sugar
2 tbsp lemon juice
Combine until smooth.
Yield: 24 servings (156 calories -27% fat per slice)
